name: Calzones
recipeIngredient: 2 loaves frozen bread dough (Italian or pizza)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw two loaves of bread dough.
2. Divide each loaf into 10 equal parts.
3. Roll each dough piece on a floured board or stretch with your hands to form 10 7-inch squares.
4. Fold each dough square over half a cheese slice to form a turnover, and pinch the edges to seal.
5. Place each turnover in a small sandwich bag.
6. Put 5 turnovers in a 1-gallon freezer bag.
7. Divide sauce into two portions and store in 2 1-quart freezer bags; enclose each bag of Calzones with the corresponding sauce bag.
8. To prepare for serving, thaw the sauce; heat in a medium pan for 10 to 15 minutes until bubbly.
9. Take frozen turnovers out of their bags and place them about 2 inches apart on a baking sheet sprayed with a nonstick spray.
10. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
11. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until turnovers are golden brown.
12. Ladle sauce over the turnovers and serve.
